description: Gym sack styling on a classic handbag for that laidback vibe, by murcia. Late for the office? Dump all your essentials into this leather sack and rush to work. You'll look stylish and all your things will be safe in this thick leather bag! Height: 39 cm Width: 34 cm Depth: 19 cm Total length of strap: 96 cm Soft, supple leather upper Fabric lining Tie ups at the mouth of the bag One main compartment Broad shoulder strap Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
